examples: The cartilaginous framework of the tip has been described as a tripod.
Histology showed a marked increase in the size of the cartilaginous soft callus.
Sharks' cartilaginous skeletons decay quickly, leaving just tiny clues as to their lifestyles.
Dr Dario and Dr Stefanini have built him a device called Lampetra (pictured top), which is made of circular segments modelled on the lamprey's cartilaginous vertebrae.
